name: Nordic Council
climate: Subarctic to maritime temperate; Gulf Stream moderates Norwegian coast; continental cold in Finland and interior Sweden; sub-polar in Iceland

neighbors.name: European Union
neighbors.relevance: Denmark, Finland, Sweden are EU members; Norway and Iceland in EEA; deeply integrated single market

neighbors.name: Baltic Sea Region
neighbors.relevance: Sweden, Finland, Denmark are Baltic littoral states; shared maritime security and trade routes

neighbors.name: Arctic Sea Route
neighbors.relevance: Norway, Iceland, Finland, Sweden have Arctic territories; resource extraction and shipping route access

neighbors.name: Commonwealth of Independent States
neighbors.relevance: Finland and Norway share land borders with Russia; direct security and energy implications

neighbors.name: Five Eyes
neighbors.relevance: Close intelligence cooperation with anglophone allies on Arctic and NATO security

links.description: Three Nordic members in EU; Norway contributes to EU budget via EEA agreement
Nordic states anchor the western and northern Baltic; joint maritime patrol and energy infrastructure
Nordic nations control key Arctic shipping access points and resource claims
Finland uses the euro; Denmark pegs its krone to EUR; Sweden's krona floats but trade is eurozone-oriented
Norwegian gas and Swedish iron ore supply German industry; major bilateral trade corridor
NATO's northern flank faces Russia across the Finnish and Norwegian borders
